posts.body:
On my player boards the Lizard Cult no longer says "in the outcast suit" for the Craft action. 

Can Lizards now craft using any gardens instead of just gardens matching the outcast suit?

meeb93 wrote:

On my player boards the Lizard Cult no longer says "in the outcast suit" for the Build action. 

Can Lizards now craft using any gardens instead of just gardens matching the outcast suit? 

It looks like in the new rules, the Outcast only matters for Conspiracies and Crafting.  For Building, you can build anywhere.  (At least that's what the Law says, too).

sigmazero13 wrote:

meeb93 wrote:

On my player boards the Lizard Cult no longer says "in the outcast suit" for the Build action. 

Can Lizards now craft using any gardens instead of just gardens matching the outcast suit? 

It looks like in the new rules, the Outcast only matters for Conspiracies and Crafting.  For Building, you can build anywhere.  (At least that's what the Law says, too).

Ah my bad I meant the Craft action.

meeb93 wrote:

sigmazero13 wrote:

meeb93 wrote:

On my player boards the Lizard Cult no longer says "in the outcast suit" for the Build action. 

Can Lizards now craft using any gardens instead of just gardens matching the outcast suit? 

It looks like in the new rules, the Outcast only matters for Conspiracies and Crafting.  For Building, you can build anywhere.  (At least that's what the Law says, too).

Ah my bad I meant the Craft action.

Ah.  In the law (10.6.2) it says it must match the Outcast suit, so I'm guessing if it's not on the board, it was an inadvertent omission.
Pretty sure that only in outcast /hatred clearing ... otherwise they are OP.
Yeah, the law didn't change on that part, so it's weird for it to suddenly disappear from the board without any reason. Could you upload a photo of the board?
FWIW, this is a photo of my player board from the most recent Kickstarter:
I have the new printing and it says to craft using the Outcast suit.
C'mon, Jeff G.  Show us a picture!
Was about to take a picture and turns out I’m just blind. It says outcast suit clear as day. My apologies.

patrickfatrick wrote:

I have the new printing and it says to craft using the Outcast suit.

How do they craft the card that requires one of each clearing type, then? Or can they not...

mineminemine wrote:

patrickfatrick wrote:

I have the new printing and it says to craft using the Outcast suit.

How do they craft the card that requires one of each clearing type, then? Or can they not...

They cannot

starlitepony wrote:

mineminemine wrote:

patrickfatrick wrote:

I have the new printing and it says to craft using the Outcast suit.

How do they craft the card that requires one of each clearing type, then? Or can they not...

They cannot

With the latest expansions and rules, there are ways for them to craft those. 

For example:
- If you have garden(s) at the Lost City, they're "wild" crafting pieces (for example a mouse-garden in Lost City is still activated by mouse outcast, but can craft rabbit/fox as well)
- If you crafted the Rabbit, Mouse and/or Fox "Laborers" card (from frog deck) which counts those suit of enclaves as extra crafting pieces
- If you control the "River Roamers" Hireling, which let's you craft using their lilypads tokens.
